We should pray against this result of sin more than anything else. Do not cast me away from your presence. No one is cast out of God's presence except those who first throw themselves out through sin. Zedekiah’s flight was in vain, because there is no escaping the judgments of God; they come upon the sinner and overtake him, no matter where he goes.
The Chaldean army caused great destruction. But what is particularly related here is the removal of items from the temple. Remembering their beauty and value shows us more clearly the evil of sin.

The leaders of the Jews led them astray; but now they are especially made examples of God’s justice. Here is an account of two earlier captivities. This people often were wonders, both of judgment and mercy.

See this history of King Jehoiachin in [reference]. Those who suffer oppression will find it is not in vain for them to hope and quietly wait for the salvation of the Lord. Our times are in God’s hand, because the hearts of all we deal with are his. May we be enabled more and more to rest on the Rock of Ages, and to look forward with holy faith to that hour when the Lord will restore Zion and overthrow all the enemies of the church.
